summary: Frontend-only verification of `created_by = user.email` migration (was user_id UUID). Used Playwright with page.route() interception to capture POST/GET bodies + query params on /api/eval/jobs, /api/eval/jobs-with-es, and /api/eval/groups/{id}/comments. All four FIX-VERIFY checks + both NO-REGRESSION checks PASSED. No bugs introduced.

PRIMARY_post_jobs_created_by_is_email.evidence: 3 POSTs to /api/eval/jobs each carried body.created_by = 'TEST_pw_user@emergent.com' (NOT the UUID 0ee59a27-...). Routes were fulfilled with a 200 stub so no real harness pollution.

FIX_VERIFY_2_comments_post_no_created_by.evidence: POST /api/eval/groups/<gid>/comments body was exactly {"text":"TEST_pw_comment_iter33"} — no created_by field. apiHelpers regex matchers [/jobs(\/|$|-with-es$)/, /testing-agent-evals(\/|$)/, /groups\/[^/]+\/jobs(\/|$)/] correctly skip /comments routes. Rendered comment row displayed author name 'PW Test User (Emergent)' (the user's display name from the seeded session, not the email — that is the GroupCommentsPanel default and unchanged by this fix).

FIX_VERIFY_4_client_predicate.evidence: Code review of /app/frontend/src/components/evals/EvalFilterBar.js buildJobFilter(): when mineOnly && currentUserCreatedBy, predicate compares `(job.created_by || job.config?.created_by) === currentUserCreatedBy` where currentUserCreatedBy = user.email (EvalRuns.js line 190). Jobs stamped with legacy user_id UUID will fail this string equality and be hidden — matches the requirement.

NO_REGRESSION_multi_run_agent_name.evidence: numRuns=3 produced exactly 3 sequential POSTs to /api/eval/jobs, each with agent_name='TEST_pw_agent_iter33' at top-level of the body (not under evals[].experiments — top-level is the actual harness payload shape) and group_run_id suffixed -run-1, -run-2, -run-3. iter32 multi-run loop intact.

NO_REGRESSION_logged_out.evidence: After localStorage.removeItem('acm_session_token') + hard reload, route guard redirected to /login (cannot reach /evals to inspect comment textarea placeholder directly). Code path verified: AuthContext.setUser(null) calls setCreatedBy(null); apiHelpers.attachOwnership early-returns when getCreatedBy() is falsy — no injection branch reached. GroupCommentsPanel placeholder ternary uses `user ? 'Add a comment about this run…' : 'Sign in to add a comment'` (line 166 of GroupCommentsPanel.js).

critical_code_review_comments: EvalFilterBar.js header comment (line 13) still says 'mineOnly is also passed to the BFF jobs list as created_by=<user_id>' — stale doc; should now read <email>. Cosmetic, no functional impact.
EvalRuns.js fetchJobs useCallback dep array (line 285) correctly includes currentUserCreatedBy after the rename — good. eslint-disable-next-line on line 218 unchanged — fine.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded session. All POSTs were intercepted with page.route() + route.fulfill(200, stub) so no real eval jobs or comments were created in the harness or Mongo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: If iter33 fix re-tested: use the same pw_emergent_gate_post token, use page.route() to capture POST bodies on /api/eval/jobs and /api/eval/groups/<gid>/comments, and to read URL params on GET /api/eval/jobs (Mine-only toggle). Fulfill rather than continue so we don't pollute the harness. RunEvalModal navigation requires (1) selecting a dataset on step 1, (2) filling eval-group-id (required) and eval-num-runs on step 2, (3) eval-agent-name-override for the agent_name top-level field. submit-eval-button is on step 3.
rca_of_the_issue: Not a bug investigation — fix verification only. Pre-fix the apiHelpers axios interceptor stamped body.created_by with user.user_id (UUID) and the Mine-only filter passed/compared the UUID; post-fix all three sites (AuthContext setCreatedBy/useCreatedBy, EvalRuns.currentUserCreatedBy + buildJobFilter call site, EvalFilterBar.buildJobFilter parameter rename) consistently read/write user.email. Captured network evidence confirms the rename took effect end-to-end.
